sections.paragraph:
fut. יִשְׁפֹּת-

(1) to place, to put (i.q. שׁוּת which I suppose to be itself cognate to this verb, so that פ is softened into ב, and even into ו; compare עִפֵּר, עִוֵּר; חָפַר and חוּר to dig; טָפַח and טוּחַ to spread out, and to spread over. Also שָׁפַט and שָׁבַט). 2Ki 4:38 Eze 24:3 Psa 22:16, לַעֲפַר מָוֶת תִּשְׁפְּתֵנִי “into the dust of death (in the sepulchre) thou wilt put me.”

(2) followed by a dat. of pers., to give, Isa 26:12.

Derivatives, אַשְׁפֹּת, מִשְׁפְּתַיִם.
